km.Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England: бһҹбҹҠбһёбһ бҹ’бһҹбһ¶бһҡбһ бҹ’бһӮh бһ бһ¶бһӣ, wesбһҸбһҳбҹүбһјбһҡбһӣбҹӮбһ“, бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ‘бҹҒбһҹбһўбһ„бҹӢбһӮбҹ’бһӣбҹҒбһҹ

zh.lifeSummary: з•¶Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.ж–јеӨ§зҙ„1288е№ҙеҮәз”ҹеңЁиӢұеңӢз¶ӯж–Ҝзү№иҺ«и—Қеҫ·жҷӮпјҢд»–зҡ„зҲ¶иҰӘSir Walter Strickland of Sizergh35жӯІпјҢжҜҚиҰӘEleanor Goldington19жӯІгҖӮд»–ж–ј1322е№ҙиҲҮCecily Wellesзөҗе©ҡгҖӮд»–еҖ‘иҮіе°‘жҳҜ5еҖӢе…’еӯҗе’Ң1еҖӢеҘіе…’зҡ„зҲ¶жҜҚгҖӮд»–еҺ»дё–ж–ј1376е№ҙеңЁиӢұеңӢз¶ӯж–Ҝзү№иҺ«и—Қеҫ·еёҢзҲҫ йңҚзҲҫдә«е№ҙ89жӯІгҖӮ

zh-hans.lifeSummary: еҪ“Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.дәҺеӨ§зәҰ1288е№ҙеҮәз”ҹеңЁиӢұеӣҪз¶ӯж–Ҝзү№иҺ«и—Қеҫ·ж—¶пјҢд»–зҡ„зҲ¶дәІSir Walter Strickland of Sizergh35еІҒпјҢжҜҚдәІEleanor Goldington19еІҒгҖӮд»–дәҺ1322е№ҙдёҺCecily Wellesз»“е©ҡгҖӮд»–д»¬иҮіе°‘жҳҜ5дёӘе„ҝеӯҗе’Ң1дёӘеҘіе„ҝзҡ„зҲ¶жҜҚгҖӮд»–еҺ»дё–дәҺ1376е№ҙеңЁиӢұеӣҪз¶ӯж–Ҝзү№иҺ«и—Қеҫ·еёҢзҲҫ йңҚзҲҫдә«е№ҙ89еІҒгҖӮ

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names В© Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stД«rc вҖҳstirk, young bullock or heiferвҖҷ + land вҖҳlandвҖҷ.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names В© Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as вҖҳThomas, called DidymusвҖҷ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for вҖҳtwinвҖҷ, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning вҖҳtwinвҖҷ. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. was born about 1288, in Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh, was 35 and his mother, Eleanor Goldington, was 19. He married Cecily Welles in 1322. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1376, in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. est nГ© environ 1288, Г  Westmorland, Angleterre, son pГЁre, Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh, avait 35 ans et sa mГЁre, Eleanor Goldington, avait 19 ans. Il a Г©pousГ© Cecily Welles en 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est dГ©cГ©dГ© en 1376, Г  Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, Г  lвҖҷГўge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. um 1288 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh 35 und seine Mutter Eleanor Goldington 19. Er hat 1322 Cecily Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 SГ¶hne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1376 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. ГЁ nato il circa 1288 nel Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Goldington, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Welles nel 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. MorГ¬ nel 1376, nel Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, all'etГ  di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.гҒҢзҙ„1288е№ҙгҒ«гӮӨгӮ®гғӘгӮ№гӮҰгӮЁгӮ№гғҲгғўгғјгғ©гғігғүгҒ§з”ҹгҒҫгӮҢгҒҹжҷӮпјҢзҲ¶Sir Walter Strickland of SizerghгҒҜ35жӯіпјҢжҜҚEleanor GoldingtonгҒҜ19жӯігҒ§гҒӮгҒЈгҒҹгҖӮ1322е№ҙгҒ«Cecily WellesгҒЁзөҗе©ҡгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮеҪјгӮүгҒҜе°‘гҒӘгҒҸгҒЁгӮӮ5дәәгҒ®жҒҜеӯҗгҒЁ1дәәгҒ®еЁҳгҒ®иҰӘгҒ§гҒӮгҒЈгҒҹгҖӮеҪјгҒҜ1376е№ҙгҒ«гӮӨгӮ®гғӘгӮ№гӮҰгӮЁгӮ№гғҲгғўгғјгғ©гғігғүгӮ·гӮәгӮЁгғ«гӮ° гғҸгғ«гҒ§89жӯігҒ§жӯ»еҺ»гҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Strickland Knt.(мқҙ)к°Җ лҢҖлһө 1288л…„ мҳҒкөӯ мӣЁмҠӨнҠёлӘЁлҘјлһңл“ңм—җм„ң нғңм–ҙлӮ¬мқ„ л•Ң, к·ёмқҳ м•„лІ„м§Җ Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh(мқҖ)лҠ” 35м„ёмҳҖкі , к·ёмқҳ м–ҙлЁёлӢҲ Eleanor Goldington(мқҖ)лҠ” 19м„ёмҳҖлӢӨ. к·ёлҠ” 1322л…„ Cecily Welles(мҷҖ)кіј кІ°нҳјн–ҲлӢӨ. к·ёл“ӨмқҖ м Ғм–ҙлҸ„ лӢӨм„Ҝ лӘ…мқҳ м•„л“Өкіј н•ң лӘ…мқҳ л”ёмқ„ л‘җм—ҲлӢӨ. к·ёлҠ” 1376л…„ мҳҒкөӯ мӣЁмҠӨнҠёлӘЁлҘјлһңл“ң мӢңмҰҲлҘҙк·ёh нҷҖм—җм„ң 89м„ёмқҳ лӮҳмқҙлЎң мӮ¬л§қн–ҲлӢӨ.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh, tinha 35 anos e sua mГЈe, Eleanor Goldington, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Welles em 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1376, em Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: РҡРҫРіРҙР° Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. СҖРҫРҙРёР»СҒСҸ РҫРәРҫР»Рҫ 1288 Рі. РІ РјРөСҒСӮРҪРҫСҒСӮРё РІРөСҒСӮРјРҫСҖР»Р°РҪРҙ, РҗРҪРіР»РёСҸ, РөРіРҫ РҫСӮСҶСғ РҝРҫ РёРјРөРҪРё Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh РұСӢР»Рҫ 35 Р»РөСӮ, Р° РјР°СӮРөСҖРё, РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСғСҺ Р·РІР°Р»Рё Eleanor Goldington, 19. РһРҪ Р¶РөРҪРёР»СҒСҸ РҪР° Р¶РөРҪСүРёРҪРө РҝРҫ РёРјРөРҪРё Cecily Welles РІ 1322 Рі. РЈ РҪРёС… РұСӢР»Рҫ РҝРҫ РәСҖР°Р№РҪРөР№ РјРөСҖРө 5 СҒСӢРҪРҫРІРөР№ Рё 1 РҙРҫСҮСҢ. РһРҪ СғРјРөСҖ РІ 1376 Рі. РІ РјРөСҒСӮРҪРҫСҒСӮРё СҒРёР·РёСҖРі С…РҫР»Р», РІРөСҒСӮРјРҫСҖР»Р°РҪРҙ, РҗРҪРіР»РёСҸ РІ РІРҫР·СҖР°СҒСӮРө 89 Р»РөСӮ.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Strickland Knt. naciГі aproximadamente 1288, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papГЎ, Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh, tenГӯa 35 aГұos y su mamГЎ, Eleanor Goldington, tenГӯa 19 aГұos. Se casГі con Cecily Welles en 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. MuriГі en 1376, en Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 aГұos.
